# Scenario: RET on edit tool diff opens the edited file at the correct line.
#
# Why this matters:
#   The edit tool body sets the `opencode-file-path' text property and a
#   specialized keymap so RET opens the edited file.  The chat buffer then
#   applies `opencode-chat-message-map' over the whole message region via
#   `opencode-chat--apply-message-props'.  That call must NOT blanket-
#   overwrite the specialized keymap — otherwise RET on the edit diff
#   falls through to the generic message keymap (no file open).
#
# This scenario exercises BOTH code paths that reach apply-message-props:
#   1. SSE streaming (message.part.updated → render-tool-part → apply-…)
#   2. Full refresh (render-messages → render-tool-part → apply-…)
# and asserts the specialized keymap survives both.

:session ses_edit_ret_test
:directory /tmp/opencode-edit-ret-test

# --- Create a real file on disk so line navigation is verifiable ---
:eval (make-directory "/tmp/opencode-edit-ret-test/src/" t)
:eval (with-temp-file "/tmp/opencode-edit-ret-test/src/app.ts" (dotimes (i 30) (insert (format "line %d\n" (1+ i)))))
# Point default-directory at the session root so file resolution works.
:eval (setq default-directory "/tmp/opencode-edit-ret-test/")

# ============================================================
# PATH 1 — SSE streaming
# ============================================================

# User message
:sse {"directory":"/tmp/opencode-edit-ret-test","payload":{"type":"message.updated","properties":{"info":{"id":"msg_u1","sessionID":"ses_edit_ret_test","role":"user","time":{"created":1771415771263}}}}}

# Session busy
:sse {"directory":"/tmp/opencode-edit-ret-test","payload":{"type":"session.status","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_edit_ret_test","status":{"type":"busy"}}}}
:assert-busy

# Assistant message
:sse {"directory":"/tmp/opencode-edit-ret-test","payload":{"type":"message.updated","properties":{"info":{"id":"msg_asst1","sessionID":"ses_edit_ret_test","role":"assistant","time":{"created":1771415771266},"parentID":"msg_u1","modelID":"claude-opus-4-6","providerID":"anthropic","mode":"build","path":{"cwd":"/tmp/opencode-edit-ret-test","root":"/tmp/opencode-edit-ret-test"},"cost":0,"tokens":{"input":0,"output":0,"reasoning":0,"cache":{"read":0,"write":0}}}}}}

# Step start + edit tool lifecycle
:sse {"directory":"/tmp/opencode-edit-ret-test","payload":{"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_step1","sessionID":"ses_edit_ret_test","messageID":"msg_asst1","type":"step-start"}}}}
:sse {"directory":"/tmp/opencode-edit-ret-test","payload":{"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_edit1","sessionID":"ses_edit_ret_test","messageID":"msg_asst1","type":"tool","callID":"call_001","tool":"edit","state":{"status":"pending","input":{},"raw":""}}}}}
:sse {"directory":"/tmp/opencode-edit-ret-test","payload":{"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_edit1","sessionID":"ses_edit_ret_test","messageID":"msg_asst1","type":"tool","callID":"call_001","tool":"edit","state":{"status":"running","input":{"filePath":"src/app.ts","oldString":"line 10\nline 11\n","newString":"line 10 modified\nline 11 modified\nline 11b new\n"},"title":"Edit src/app.ts","time":{"start":1771415771300}}}}}}
:sse {"directory":"/tmp/opencode-edit-ret-test","payload":{"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_edit1","sessionID":"ses_edit_ret_test","messageID":"msg_asst1","type":"tool","callID":"call_001","tool":"edit","state":{"status":"completed","input":{"filePath":"src/app.ts","oldString":"line 10\nline 11\n","newString":"line 10 modified\nline 11 modified\nline 11b new\n"},"output":"OK","title":"Edit src/app.ts","metadata":{},"time":{"start":1771415771300,"end":1771415771400}}}}}}

# Session idle
:sse {"directory":"/tmp/opencode-edit-ret-test","payload":{"type":"session.status","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_edit_ret_test","status":{"type":"idle"}}}}
:sse {"directory":"/tmp/opencode-edit-ret-test","payload":{"type":"session.idle","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_edit_ret_test"}}}
:assert-idle

# --- The critical assertions after SSE render ---
:assert-contains src/app.ts

# opencode-file-path property must exist at the file path.
# Combine find+assert into a single eval so match data stays valid.
:eval (goto-char (point-min))
:eval (let ((pos (point-min))) (while (and pos (not (equal (get-text-property pos 'opencode-file-path) "src/app.ts"))) (setq pos (next-single-property-change pos 'opencode-file-path))) (should pos) (goto-char pos) (should (eq (key-binding (kbd "RET")) 'opencode-chat-message-open-file-at-point)))

# ============================================================
# PATH 2 — :refresh path (render-messages → apply-message-props)
# ============================================================
# This is the specific path that was broken by the clickable-file patch:
# on a full refresh, apply-message-props was overwriting the file keymap.

:refresh [{"info":{"id":"msg_u1","sessionID":"ses_edit_ret_test","role":"user","time":{"created":1771415771263}},"parts":[{"id":"prt_user_text","sessionID":"ses_edit_ret_test","messageID":"msg_u1","type":"text","text":"Edit the file"}]},{"info":{"id":"msg_asst1","sessionID":"ses_edit_ret_test","role":"assistant","time":{"created":1771415771266,"completed":1771415771500},"modelID":"claude-opus-4-6","providerID":"anthropic","agent":"build","tokens":{"input":10,"output":5,"reasoning":0,"cache":{"read":0,"write":0}}},"parts":[{"id":"prt_step1","sessionID":"ses_edit_ret_test","messageID":"msg_asst1","type":"step-start"},{"id":"prt_edit1","sessionID":"ses_edit_ret_test","messageID":"msg_asst1","type":"tool","callID":"call_001","tool":"edit","state":{"status":"completed","input":{"filePath":"src/app.ts","oldString":"line 10\nline 11\n","newString":"line 10 modified\nline 11 modified\nline 11b new\n"},"output":"OK","metadata":{},"time":{"start":1771415771300,"end":1771415771400}}}]}]

# The same assertions must pass after a full refresh.
:assert-contains src/app.ts
:eval (let ((pos (point-min))) (while (and pos (not (equal (get-text-property pos 'opencode-file-path) "src/app.ts"))) (setq pos (next-single-property-change pos 'opencode-file-path))) (should pos) (goto-char pos) (should (eq (key-binding (kbd "RET")) 'opencode-chat-message-open-file-at-point)))

# Also confirm the generic message keymap is still in effect OUTSIDE the edit body.
# Pick a position that does NOT have opencode-file-path and verify RET/g fall through.
:eval (goto-char (point-min))
:eval (let ((pos (point-min))) (while (and pos (get-text-property pos 'opencode-file-path)) (setq pos (next-single-property-change pos 'opencode-file-path))) (goto-char (or pos (point-min))) (should (eq (key-binding (kbd "g")) 'opencode-chat--refresh)))

# ============================================================
# Test the three open-file behaviors (post-refresh)
# ============================================================
# Each behavior test wraps every file-visit in a save-excursion-like
# dance and returns to the chat buffer before the next :eval so that
# `point-min'/`point-max' stay valid in the chat buffer context.

# Behavior (a) — no buffer for the file, opens in other window.
:eval (let ((pos (point-min)) (opened nil)) (while (and pos (not (equal (get-text-property pos 'opencode-file-path) "src/app.ts"))) (setq pos (next-single-property-change pos 'opencode-file-path))) (goto-char pos) (cl-letf (((symbol-function 'find-file-other-window) (lambda (path &rest _) (setq opened path) (find-file-noselect path)))) (opencode-chat-message-open-file-at-point)) (should opened) (should (string-suffix-p "src/app.ts" opened)))

# Behavior (b) — file buffer already visible in a window, RET jumps to it.
# Wrap the whole flow in a single eval so the chat buffer stays current at the end.
:eval (let ((chat-buf (current-buffer))) (save-window-excursion (split-window) (other-window 1) (find-file "/tmp/opencode-edit-ret-test/src/app.ts") (let ((file-win (selected-window))) (other-window 1) (switch-to-buffer chat-buf) (let ((pos (point-min))) (while (and pos (not (equal (get-text-property pos 'opencode-file-path) "src/app.ts"))) (setq pos (next-single-property-change pos 'opencode-file-path))) (goto-char pos) (opencode-chat-message-open-file-at-point) (should (eq (selected-window) file-win))))))

# Behavior (c) — file buffer exists but not visible in any window.
:eval (let ((chat-buf (current-buffer))) (save-window-excursion (let ((pos (point-min))) (with-current-buffer chat-buf (while (and pos (not (equal (get-text-property pos 'opencode-file-path) "src/app.ts"))) (setq pos (next-single-property-change pos 'opencode-file-path))) (goto-char pos) (let ((chat-win (selected-window))) (opencode-chat-message-open-file-at-point) (should (not (eq (selected-window) chat-win))))))))

# Cleanup
:eval (when-let ((buf (find-buffer-visiting "/tmp/opencode-edit-ret-test/src/app.ts"))) (kill-buffer buf))
:eval (delete-directory "/tmp/opencode-edit-ret-test" t)
